evidence_quotes.quote: Stop Destroying Videogames initiative included in this bill with over 1,4 million signatures.

I also think it would be good to rain in the power of Payment processors where they need to process all legal purchases and cannot tell any vendor / consumer what they are allowed to buy or pressure them to what type of content they provide / consume.
All financial data & personal data should only be allowed to be stored and processed in the EU even its when anonymous without access from outside the EU.

paragraphs.text: Dear EU Commission, 1: I would like to see the Stop Destroying Videogames initiative included in this bill with over 1,4 million signatures. 2: I also think it would be good to rain in the power of Payment processors where they need to process all legal purchases and cannot tell any vendor / consumer what they are allowed to buy or pressure them to what type of content they provide / consume. If they really think something is Illegal, they should report it to the proper authorities. 3: All financial data & personal data should only be allowed to be stored and processed in the EU even its when anonymous without access from outside the EU.
